segments.caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a massive concert venue, darkened except for vibrant stage lights and a sea of glowing phone screens from the audience. The stage is flanked by large screens displaying pixelated, retro-style humanoid figures in motion, evoking a video game aesthetic. The words 'PRESS START' appear in bold, glitchy text on the screens, reinforcing the digital theme. As the camera zooms in, the stage reveals a central archway with a DJ booth, flanked by two large, helmeted figures resembling robotic avatars. The lighting shifts dynamically between blue, purple, and green hues, with beams cutting through the darkness. The scene transitions to a close-up of a drummer in a white jacket adorned with black abstract symbols, intensely playing his kit under blue and green stage lights. The camera then cuts to a guitarist with curly blonde hair, wearing a matching patterned jacket and white shorts, energetically playing a white electric guitar while moving across the stage. The guitarist’s outfit features bold black-and-white graphic patterns, and he wears black boots. The stage backdrop changes colors rapidly, cycling through red, yellow, and blue, while the screens continue to display animated, pixelated figures. The performance is high-energy, with the musicians fully immersed in their roles, and the audience visibly engaged, creating a futuristic, immersive concert experience.

The Lead Singer, in a striking green-and-black zebra-print jumpsuit with matching gloves and a high ponytail, commands the Stage Extension, passionately singing into a green microphone while engaging with the audience. She is flanked by the Backup Singers, who wear black-and-white patterned jumpsuits with oversized bows and dance energetically. The Guitarist, in a black-and-white patterned jacket and white shorts, plays a white electric guitar with dynamic movements, often interacting with the Lead Singer. The Drummer, in a matching patterned outfit, plays intensely behind a drum kit under shifting blue and green lights. Two Stylized Backdrop Figures stand motionless behind the performers, adding theatrical depth. The TV-Head Dancers, in red bodysuits with boxy helmets, perform synchronized, robotic movements, enhancing the retro-futuristic theme. The stage is further adorned with a Giant Hand Prop and a Pink Inflatable Structure, contributing to the surreal atmosphere. The audience, visible in wide shots, is engaged, with many holding up phones to capture the moment. The lighting shifts between pink, purple, and white, creating a dynamic and immersive environment as the performers move across the stage and interact with each other and the crowd.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of an enthusiastic audience, many holding up phones and signs, including one with a colorful portrait, as they wave their hands in excitement. The camera then pulls back to reveal a massive, darkened arena filled with a sea of fans, illuminated by stage lights and glowing phones. The stage is revealed with a vibrant, futuristic design featuring a large rainbow arch, giant hand prop, and two motionless Helmeted Figures flanking the sides. The Lead Singer, in a striking green-and-black zebra-print jumpsuit, performs passionately into a green microphone, later picking up a bright pink electric guitar with a glittery strap. She is joined by two Backup Singers in black-and-white patterned jumpsuits with oversized bows, who dance energetically beside her. The stage is backed by large LED screens displaying dynamic abstract visuals, including pixelated humanoids and geometric patterns, while a Pink Inflatable Structure adds whimsy to the left. The performers move across the main stage and onto a Stage Extension, engaging directly with the crowd, who cheer and record the moment. The lighting shifts between cool blues and vibrant pinks, enhancing the surreal, retro-futuristic atmosphere. The camera captures wide aerial shots of the entire venue, emphasizing the scale of the event, before returning to close-ups of the Lead Singer’s expressive performance and the synchronized movements of the Backup Singers. The audience remains fully engaged, with many making heart shapes and waving signs, including one that reads 'Fruit & Guts' in glowing letters. The performance culminates with the group standing together on the Stage Extension, bathed in spotlight, as the crowd reaches out toward them in a moment of shared energy and connection.

segments.caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a vibrant concert stage at night, dominated by a large, illuminated rainbow arch and dynamic pixelated visuals on the Central Arched Screen and Stage Screens, which display shifting patterns of colorful blocks and abstract shapes. The Lead Singer, in a striking green and black zebra-print off-the-shoulder jumpsuit, enters the Stage Extension, holding a red microphone, and begins to perform with high energy, moving dynamically across the stage. She is joined by two Backup Singers in black-and-white patterned jumpsuits with large bow headpieces, standing on raised platforms, and two TV-Head Dancers in bright orange corsets with pink pigtails and helmet-like headpieces, performing synchronized, robotic movements. The Guitarist, in a black-and-white patterned jacket and white shorts, plays an acoustic guitar on the left, while the Keyboardist, also in a black-and-white patterned outfit, plays on a raised platform. The Drummer, in a white tank top with black abstract symbols, plays intensely behind a drum kit under shifting blue and green lights. The audience, visible in close-ups, is ecstatic, waving hands, recording with phones, and cheering, with some holding up a glowing 'Fruit & Guts' sign. The stage is flanked by the Giant Hand Prop and the Pink Inflatable Structure, adding surreal elements. The Rainbow Arch glows in pink and purple hues, and the Pixelated Humanoid Figures animate on the screens. As the performance builds, the Lead Singer dances with the TV-Head Dancers, and the screens display a pixelated smiley face and cascading brick wall. The scene culminates with the word 'MERCED' appearing in bold, pixelated white letters across the screens, accompanied by a yellow circular graphic, before fading to black. The D.Y. PATIL STADIUM is visible in the background, filled with a massive crowd under dark skies.
